description: Query pack for DKG-native production coordination plan

queries.sparql: SELECT ?task ?name ?assignee ?priority WHERE { ?task a <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#Task> ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#status> "pending" ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#name> ?name ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#assignee> ?assignee ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/plan#priority> ?priority . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?task), "urn:dkgv9:plan:")) } ORDER BY ?priority ?name

SELECT ?assignee ?task ?name ?status WHERE { ?task a <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#Task> ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#assignee> ?assignee ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#name> ?name ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#status> ?status . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?task), "urn:dkgv9:plan:")) } ORDER BY ?assignee ?name

SELECT ?d ?summary ?rationale ?madeBy ?madeAt WHERE { ?d a <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#Decision> ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#summary> ?summary ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#rationale> ?rationale ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#madeBy> ?madeBy ; <https://ontology.dkg.io/devgraph#madeAt> ?madeAt . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?d), "urn:dkgv9:plan:decision-")) } ORDER BY DESC(?madeAt)
